All Classes

  • All Classes Class Summary Enum Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    Acceleration
    Contains an acceleration value and unit.
    AccelerationConverter
    Does acceleration conversions to different units.
    AccelerationFormatter
    Formats and parses acceleration value and unit.
    AccelerationUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical acceleration units.
    Angle
    Contains angle value and unit.
    AngleConverter
    Does angle conversions to different units.
    AngleFormatter
    Formats and parses angle value and unit.
    AngleUnit
    Enumerator containing angle units.
    AngularAcceleration
    Contains angular acceleration value and unit.
    AngularAccelerationConverter
    Does angular acceleration conversions to different units.
    AngularAccelerationFormatter
    Formats and parses angular acceleration value and unit.
    AngularAccelerationUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized angular acceleration units.
    AngularSpeed
    Contains angular speed value and unit.
    AngularSpeedConverter
    Does angular speed conversions to different units.
    AngularSpeedFormatter
    Formats and parses angular speed value and unit.
    AngularSpeedUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized angular speed units.
    BuildInfo
    Contains build data of this library.
    Distance
    Contains a distance value and unit.
    DistanceConverter
    Does distance conversions to different units.
    DistanceFormatter
    Formats and parses distance value and unit.
    DistanceUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical distance units.
    Frequency
    Contains a frequency value and unit.
    FrequencyConverter
    Does frequency conversions to different units.
    FrequencyFormatter
    Formats and parses frequency value and unit.
    FrequencyUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical frequency units.
    MagneticFluxDensity
    Contains a magnetic flux density value and unit.
    MagneticFluxDensityConverter
    Does magnetic flux density conversions to different units.
    MagneticFluxDensityFormatter
    Formats and parses magnetic flux density value and unit.
    MagneticFluxDensityUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical magnetic flux density units.
    MeasureFormatter<M extends Measurement<U>,​U extends java.lang.Enum<?>>
    Base class to format and parse a given measure using its value and unit.
    Measurement<T extends java.lang.Enum<?>>
    Base class to define a measurement unit and value.
    Speed
    Contains a speed value and unit.
    SpeedConverter
    Does speed conversions to different units.
    SpeedFormatter
    Formats and parses speed value and unit.
    SpeedUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical speed units.
    Surface
    Contains a surface value and unit.
    SurfaceConverter
    Does surface conversions to different units.
    SurfaceFormatter
    Formats and parses surface value and unit.
    SurfaceUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized surface units.
    Time
    Contains a time value and unit.
    TimeConverter
    Does time conversions to different units.
    TimeFormatter
    Formats and parses time value and unit.
    TimeUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized typical time units.
    UnitLocale
    Helper class to determine the appropriate unit system for a given locale.
    UnitsException
    Base exception for units package.
    UnitSystem
    Enumerator containing supported unit systems.
    UnknownUnitException
    Exception raised when a unit cannot be determined.
